covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Oklahoma State Department of Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: Oklahoma State Department of Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ok_dph.name: Oklahoma State Department of Health
ok_dph.description: Oklahoma State Department of Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Oklahoma covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, adenovirus, coronavirus, enterovirus, metapneumovirus, mycoplasma, parainfluenza, ili . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
ok_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
